theme: brew fifty potions from one shared stockpot
title: Shared Stockpot Chain: A Forest of Brew Orders
strategies: naive per-order left-to-right fold, no sharing at all (trivial)
per-order optimal matrix-chain DP solved independently for every brew order (greedy)
shared candidate-point coarsening: restrict every order to a common cut-point set and solve one globally memoized DP so overlapping orders reuse the same stockpot nodes (strong)
joint global optimization over the full DAG of all 50 orders simultaneously (open ceiling, uncovered)
